ItacAcademyItem.Name: Silenti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Three trees laden with apples, with a scroll on which is written the name of the academy
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The emblem can be found in the volume Conclusione di filosofia sostenuta da Annibale Tasca, custode dell`Accademia dei Silenti (o Taciturni) la sera del 12 gennaio 1654 nella propria casa in contrada San Giuliano; Oratio habita in funere ... Renati de Voger domini de Angerson... in aedibus SS. Joannis et Pauli coram principe die 27 Julii 1651... (Venetiis, Tinelli, 1651). None of these volumes is in British Library collections.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
